name: cointegration
notes: Evidence that a linear spread is stationary.

name: hedge_ratio
notes: Position ratio that defines the spread between assets.

name: beta
notes: Market or pair sensitivity used for exposure normalization.

name: ecm_x
notes: Error correction term or adjustment coefficient for asset X.

name: ecm_y
notes: Error correction term or adjustment coefficient for asset Y.

name: ecm_strength
notes: Magnitude and reliability of error correction.

name: half_life
notes: Estimated time for spread deviation to decay by half.

name: hurst
notes: Long memory statistic; below 0.5 suggests mean reversion.

name: copula
notes: Joint distribution model or copula family fit.

name: conditional_probabilities
notes: Conditional probability distortion between observed and expected co-movement.

name: ml_confidence
notes: Model-estimated probability or confidence for favorable outcome.

name: profile_match
notes: Similarity to historically successful trade profiles.
